title: White House offers concessions to Dems in bid to end DHS shutdown
shortDescription: The Trump administration has offered concessions to Democrats to end the DHS shutdown. But they all come with caveats.

title: The made-for-TV primary elections in Illinois and what they mean
shortDescription: It is Election Day in Illinois, and a number of key races could help forecast political trends across the country later this year and ahead of 2028.

title: Trump admin sued for ending 'Democrat projects,' subway expansion aid
shortDescription: The Second Avenue Subway expansion has been planned for a century. Federal officials abruptly withheld funds on what Trump called "Democrat projects."

title: Why does Trump want Cuba amid power outages, oil blockades?
shortDescription: Trump has recently increased pressure on the island nation of Cuba, adding March 17 Washington would be doing "something with Cuba" soon.

title: Trump's Iran war dilemma hinges on how to end it
shortDescription: USA TODAY Washington Bureau Chief Susan Page analyzes the lessons President Donald Trump may have learned from his war on Iran.

title: States sue Trump administration over fair housing protections
shortDescription: California and 14 other states have filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration over new guidelines issued to housing agencies nationwide.

title: Who replaces a liberal lion? Updates on Illinois Senate primary
shortDescription: The 2026 primary season heads to Illinois, where voters will weigh in on races for U.S. Senate and state governor.

title: What's in the SAVE Act and how would voters be impacted?
shortDescription: The contentious SAVE America Act would impact voting access for millions of Americans.

title: The Senate's bitter SAVE Act fight is starting. It may be a long one
shortDescription: An eventual vote on Trump's top legislative priority, what Democrats call a "voter suppression bill," is almost certain to fail.

title: Trump says it's 'a good thing' Joe Kent resigned
shortDescription: "I always thought he was weak on security." President Donald Trump reacted to counterterrorism chief Joe Kent's resignation.

title: Amid Trump attacks, Chief Justice Roberts says stop being hostile to judges
shortDescription: Supreme Court Chief Justice John Roberts said the idea that he and other justices are on the court to carry out a president's agenda is "absurd."

title: Trump pardons protect man accused of planting DC pipe bombs, defense says
shortDescription: Brian Cole, the man accused of planting pipe bombs on Capitol Hill on Jan. 5, 2021, should be set free based on Trump's other Jan. 6 pardons, his defense argued.

title: Hacker takes over crosswalk system to play anti-Trump profanities
shortDescription: Hackers took over a Denver crosswalk system to protest President Donald Trump and the Iran war.

title: Trump, Vance go green with Irish prime minister on St. Patrick’s Day
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance wore their best green ties for their visit with the Irish prime minister on St. Patrick's Day.

title: Joe Kent's wife died in an ISIS bombing. Here's why he quit Team Trump
shortDescription: Joe Kent resigned from his post as the president's top counterterrorism official over the Iran war. Here's what to know about him.

title: Trump attacks Newsom's 'learning disability'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said presidents should not have a "learning disability," taking aim at California Gov. Gavin Newsom.

title: Trump says Newsom should be disqualified over dyslexia remarks
shortDescription: President Trump says Gov. Gavin Newsom’s dyslexia should disqualify him from the presidency, intensifying their ongoing political clash.

title: Trump said Newsom shouldn't be president due to a learning disability
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has said repeatedly that California Gov. Gavin Newsom shouldn't be president because of his learning disability, dyslexia.

title: US intelligence official quits over Iran war, says Trump was duped
shortDescription: "We started this war due to pressure from Israel," NCTC Director Joe Kent said in his resignation letter to President Donald Trump.

title: Trump says he believes he'll be 'taking Cuba,' calling it an 'honor'
shortDescription: President Trump said he believes he'll have 'the honor of taking Cuba' as the island nation faces economic struggle and power outages.

title: Trump Kennedy Center shutting down for 2 years, board votes
shortDescription: The board of the Trump-Kennedy Center approved a two-year building shutdown as a part of a $200 million renovation plan.
